plan.name: Vimeo FY26 Revenue Compensation Plan
plan.description: Monthly periods aggregate into quarterly (ISR, SDR) and annual (all other roles) measurement windows. Retention draws pay Q1–Q3 with Q4 true-up. January 2026 is a flat draw month requiring March true-up. BCR proration toggle (fixed vs prorated) needed for mid-period goal changes.

employeeAssumptions._note: CaptivateIQ employee assumption columns are defined per-plan. Upload these column definitions via the plan settings UI or bulk CSV import. Each row in the uploaded file should have one column per employee identifier.

formulaReference._note: CaptivateIQ SmartGrid formulas are defined in the UI and are NOT accessible via the REST API. Use the pseudo-formulas and CaptivateIQ notes below as a reference when manually building the calculation logic in the plan builder.

formulas.description: Tiered commission using universal acceleration table.
formulas.logic_explanation: Calculate attainment, determine BCR, apply marginal rate multiplier per tier on incremental bookings within each band.
formulas.captivateiq_notes: SmartGrid with TIER_LOOKUP referencing Universal Acceleration Tiers. MARGINAL tier mode. BCR from Employee Assumptions.

formulas.description: Retention scaled payout with floor and cap.
formulas.logic_explanation: Compute floor = 2×TargetRate−1. Below floor: 0%. At/above 100%: 150%. Otherwise interpolate linearly.
formulas.captivateiq_notes: Custom SmartGrid formula (continuous curve, not discrete tiers). Helper column for Floor. Reference Target Retention Rate from Assumptions.

formulas.description: Quarterly retention draw with Q4 true-up.
formulas.logic_explanation: Q1–Q3: pay DrawRate × (RetentionVariable/4). Q4: MAX(0, AnnualRetentionPayout − 3×QuarterlyDraw).
formulas.captivateiq_notes: Period Group logic for Q1–Q3 vs Q4. DrawRate from Retention Draw Rates worksheet. Track cumulative draws in running-total column.

formulas.logic_explanation: For deals ≥24 months: bonus = IncrementalARR × BCR × DurationMultiplier. Renewal MY: PriorARR × 0.5%.
formulas.pseudo_formula:
IF DealDuration >= 24 THEN Multiplier = LOOKUP(DealDuration, MultiYearTable); Bonus = ARR * BCR * Multiplier;
RenewalMYBonus = PriorARR * 0.005;
formulas.captivateiq_notes: VLOOKUP against Multi-Year Deal Multipliers. Deal-level transaction field for DealDuration required. Separate payout line for renewal MY.

formulas.logic_explanation: Services excluded from NNB quota credit, earn 50% of primary BCR. Channel: 50% of both Sourced and Fulfilled BCRs.
formulas.captivateiq_notes: Separate payout line filtered by booking_type='Services'. Channel needs two sub-lines for Sourced/Fulfilled services.

formulas.logic_explanation: $50 per passed opp + 2% of closed-won deal value on passed opps.
formulas.captivateiq_notes: Requires Passed Opportunities transaction source with PassedDate, DealValue, ClosedWonFlag. Two payout lines.

formulas.description: January 2026 flat draw and March true-up.
formulas.logic_explanation: January = vOTE/12 flat draw. February offline. March true-up reconciles Jan+Feb against actual.
formulas.pseudo_formula:
JanuaryPayout = AnnualVOTE / 12;
MarchTrueUp = ActualQ1Commission - JanuaryPayout - FebruaryEstimate;
formulas.captivateiq_notes: January draw as manual adjustment. February offline tracked as prior-period adjustment. March references both. Use Prior Period Adjustments column.

formulas.logic_explanation: ISR/SDR Mgr: sum direct report metrics. CSM/SE Mgr: regional aggregation (not sum-of-reps).
formulas.pseudo_formula:
ISRSDRMgr: MgrMetrics = SUM(DirectReports.Metrics);
CSMSEMgr: MgrRetention = RegionalRate; MgrExpansion = RegionalTotal;
formulas.captivateiq_notes: CaptivateIQ hierarchical rollup via Manager Rollup Hierarchy. CSM/SE Mgr uses region-level aggregation. Manager quotas set independently in Assumptions.
